Post-incident review · INC-24-0816 Reading · 01 Signal
Harbor Pay · Reliability

The 47-minute checkout outage.

Follow the evidence from first alert to shipped safeguards. Each read chapter stays in view.
01 / Signal09:12 UTC

Success fell. Retries rose.

Charges cleared at the gateway, but completion callbacks waited behind a fast-growing queue.

Callback retry rate18×
FindingQueue pressure
02 / Scope09:19 UTC

The failure stopped at EU-West.

US traffic and card authorization stayed healthy. Two European callback workers carried the impact.

Checkouts affected38%
FindingBlast radius bounded
03 / Cause09:31 UTC

One deploy halved the workers.

A copied staging limit reached production. Autoscaling saw busy workers, not the waiting callback queue.

Deploy 3b7a19−50%
workers 24workers 12
FindingCapacity regression
04 / Response09:59 UTC

Recover, then remove the trap.

Capacity returned first. Queue-aware scaling, a deploy guard and a replay drill closed the incident.

Orders recovered2,184
✓Queue metric✓Deploy guard✓Replay drill
Result3 safeguards shipped
01 / 0400% read
Current findingQueue pressure isolated
Wheel · capture drag · arrows · 1–4
Motion · sticky case file A user-scrubbed incident review whose sticky chapters accumulate into a persistent evidence stack.
